chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-68 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 363/2026 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No. 364/2026 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. ------ 27.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. The petitioner seeks a writ to respondents No.1 to 7 to pay the amount decreed in favour of the petitioner in F.C.Suit No.44/2018. Learned counsel for the petitioner acknowledges that the remedy of the petitioner is before the Executing Court under Order XXI C.P.C; however, submits that the execution has not borne fruit. Even so, that is no ground to invoke the writ jurisdiction. Suffice to observe that the Executing Court is vested with sufficient powers under C.P.C to effect recovery under a decree. With this observation, the petition is dismissed as not maintainable. Judge Judge Manzoor
